# Cat Chen (aka catchen)

Personal website of Cat Chen, also known online as catchen. His Chinese name is 陈广琛.

## Site

- [Homepage](https://catchen.me/)
- [English homepage](https://catchen.me/en/)
- [Chinese homepage](https://catchen.me/zh/)

## Pages

- [Resume](https://catchen.me/en/resume): Career history, education, public roles, and work experience.
- [Resume (Chinese)](https://catchen.me/zh/resume): Chinese version of Cat Chen's resume.
- [Services](https://catchen.me/en/services): Career coaching services for software engineers, CS students, and tech workers.
- [Services (Chinese)](https://catchen.me/zh/services): Chinese version of the career coaching services page.
- [Projects](https://catchen.me/en/projects): Public software projects and source code links.
- [Projects (Chinese)](https://catchen.me/zh/projects): Chinese version of the projects page.
- [Contents](https://catchen.me/en/contents): Blogs, podcast, writing profiles, and external content hubs.
- [Contents (Chinese)](https://catchen.me/zh/contents): Chinese version of the contents page.

## LLM Resources

- [Full summary](https://catchen.me/llms-full.txt)
